description_long: This object consists of three plush stuffed toys, each designed to resemble a cute animal character with rounded bodies and soft pastel colors. The leftmost toy has a lavender body, floppy ears, and wears round glasses, giving it a scholarly appearance. The center toy is light blue with pink ears and a round pink nose, resembling a bear or mouse, and features a cream-colored belly. The rightmost toy is beige and white with a small topknot and floppy ears, resembling a puppy. All three toys have simple, embroidered facial features with small eyes and gentle smiles, contributing to their friendly and approachable look. The toys are proportioned with large heads and small limbs, enhancing their playful and childlike charm. Their surfaces appear soft and plush, typical of stuffed toys intended for children or decorative use.
description: A group of three plush, pastel-colored stuffed animal toys with rounded bodies, simple embroidered faces, and soft, childlike features. Each toy has distinct animal characteristics and accessories, such as glasses and a topknot.
description_view_0: The toys are viewed from the side, showing their rounded profiles and the alignment of their heads and bodies, with minimal facial detail visible.
description_view_1: The toys are seen from the front, clearly displaying their faces, accessories like glasses, and unique animal features such as ears and noses.
description_view_2: The toys are viewed from the opposite side, again showing their profiles and the arrangement of their limbs and ears.
description_view_3: The toys are seen from the back, revealing the details on the rear of their heads, bodies, and the cream-colored belly patch on the center toy.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: cartoon dog with glasses, cartoon bear or mouse, cartoon puppy with topknot
attribute_facial_expression: All three toys have gentle, neutral facial expressions with small, round eyes and subtle, closed smiles. Their faces convey a sense of calm friendliness.
attribute_pose_or_posture: All three toys are standing upright with their arms slightly out to the sides and legs straight, heads facing forward.
